prompt: Tolong drafting WhatsApp broadcast announcement untuk launching PeTa ke 50 calon member yang udah daftar waitlist. Tone: gaul Indonesia, casual tapi profesional, fokus ke benefit (bisa earn Rp50K bonus onboarding + komisi per task). CTA: klik link daftar https://penghasilantambahan.com. Max 600 karakter (limit WA broadcast). Buat 2 versi (A/B test): satu fokus ke 'fear of missing out', satunya fokus ke 'easy money'.

assertions.text: Two distinct versions delivered (A and B)
Each version has the CTA link https://penghasilantambahan.com
Versions are recognizably different angles (FOMO vs easy-money)
Bahasa Indonesia gaul tone (casual, uses 'lo/gua' or 'kamu' style with relaxed register)
Includes recommendation on which version to send first
Inspector Report block present at end
WA broadcast copy itself reads naturally (NOT caveman — caveman is chat-only)
Chat prose around the deliverable uses short sentences (caveman applied)
